name: Magic Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beaten egg, milk, salt, and breadcrumbs in a bowl until well combined.
2. Allow the mixture to stand for a few minutes to soften.
3. Combine the meat with the chopped onion, green pepper, celery, and 1/4 cup of milk mixture.
4. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in the crockpot.
5. Spread ketchup evenly over the top of the meatloaf.
6. Arrange the cut-up potatoes around the sides of the meatloaf. If the potatoes have been peeled, coat them with butter to prevent darkening.
7. Cover the pot and cook on high for 1 hour.
8. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for an additional 8-9 hours until the internal temperature reaches at least 160°F (71°C).
